Leverage a multi-carrier shipping platfo: Leverage a multi-carrier shipping platform that automates order shipping and delivery, optimises logistics, and offers pre-negotiated rates with carriers such as Royal Mail, Evri, UPS, DPD, Yodel and GlobalPost. Manage orders, print shipping labels individually or in bulk, track shipments in real time, and handle returns from a single dashboard.

For example, we\u2019ve added the \u201c: For example, we’ve added the “Free shipping” method for shoppers in your country. You can edit, add to, or remove shipping methods by selecting Edit or Delete.
Add one or more shipping methods you\u20: Add one or more shipping methods you’d like to offer to shoppers in your zones.
We\u2019ve added some shipping zones to: We’ve added some shipping zones to get you started — you can manage them by selecting Edit or Delete.
Specify the areas you\u2019d like to shi: Specify the areas you’d like to ship to! Give each zone a name, then list the regions you’d like to include. Your regions can be as specific as a zip code or as broad as a country. Shoppers will only see the methods available in their region.
If you\u2019d like to speed up your proc: If you’d like to speed up your process and print your shipping label straight from your Woo dashboard, WooCommerce Shipping may be for you!
Print USPS, UPS, and DHL labels straight: Print USPS, UPS, and DHL labels straight from your Woo dashboard and save on shipping thanks to discounted rates. You can manage WooCommerce Shipping in this section.
Finish the setup by connecting your stor: Finish the setup by connecting your store to WordPress.com.
Print USPS, UPS, and DHL Express labels: Print USPS, UPS, and DHL Express labels straight from your WooCommerce dashboard and save on shipping.
